prompt: Generate an image showing the woman from image 1 standing next to the cat from image 2. Both subjects should have colored overlays representing semantic segmentation, similar to the style of a segmentation dataset visualization, on a plain background.
prompt_refined: Generate an image showing the smiling woman with curly hair from image 1 positioned to the left of the brown tabby cat wearing a red scarf from image 2. Apply distinct, brightly colored, semi-transparent segmentation mask overlays onto both the woman and the cat, in the style of a computer vision dataset visualization. The scene should be set on a plain, light grey background.
objects: smiling woman with curly hair (from image 1)
woman positioned to the left of the cat
distinct, brightly colored, semi-transparent segmentation mask overlay on the woman
distinct, brightly colored, semi-transparent segmentation mask overlay on the cat
computer vision dataset visualization style (for the masks)
